movements.title: Bank movements
movements.subtitle: Audit the movements detected in each account and re-send the webhook when needed.
movements.emptyNoAccounts: You don't have any accounts configured. Set up your first account to see movements here.
movements.emptyTableDesc: Once the first movement is detected in this account, it will appear here.
movements.renotifyTitle: Are you sure you want to re-notify?
movements.renotifyDesc: This will re-send the webhook for this movement to the external system.
